text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Opera O and Doto's skills improved even during
the race, and their stats exceeded previous
parameters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My success in the Triple Crown tour has people
complaining that I didn't have a real rival, like the
runners last year did. And that somehow makes us
the "weakest generation."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
...Parcae has suddenly stopped producing errors.
It's also reproduced my worst possible fate, which
I had supposedly defied and overturned.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Parcae predicts I'll lose my next goal race, the
spring Tenno Sho. */
